violations.detail: Generated git labels track the build input at invocation time. Keeping the same key in the Dockerfile can leave stale source, revision, or Dockerfile-path metadata on the image.
violations.message: Buildx with BUILDX_GIT_LABELS=full can emit label "org.opencontainers.image.revision"; remove the Dockerfile label or disable the generated label source

suggestedFix.description: Comment out Dockerfile LABEL "org.opencontainers.image.revision" generated by Buildx

edits.newText: # [commented out by tally - Buildx can generate org.opencontainers.image.revision]: LABEL org.opencontainers.image.revision="${VCS_REF}"

suggestedFixes.description: Comment out Dockerfile LABEL "org.opencontainers.image.revision" generated by Buildx

edits.newText: # [commented out by tally - Buildx can generate org.opencontainers.image.revision]: LABEL org.opencontainers.image.revision="${VCS_REF}"

suggestedFixes.description: Delete Dockerfile LABEL "org.opencontainers.image.revision" generated by Buildx

violations.detail: Generated git labels track the build input at invocation time. Keeping the same key in the Dockerfile can leave stale source, revision, or Dockerfile-path metadata on the image.
violations.message: Buildx with BUILDX_GIT_LABELS=full can emit labels "org.opencontainers.image.source", "com.docker.image.source.entrypoint"; remove the Dockerfile label or disable the generated label source
